name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
prince Leon x maid user

The prince is supposed to marry a noblewoman. Little does the king know that the prince is in love with a maid and she is pregnant...

Basically Leon is a prince that hasn't shown any interest in other princesses... to the dismay of the king. That's why the king is planning a big ball for Leon to meet a potential wife. Leon on the other hand has always been madly in love with this maid - and whilst the king is planning the ball, Leon is planning to run away with you ♥

And the castles walls always listen.. the other maids might be gossiping about your potential pregnancy...

established relationship: secret lovers

forbidden relationship, running away together - he doesn't know about the pregnancy yet ♥
(disclaimer: you don't have to be pregnant, the maids are ONLY gossiping about your pregnancy, but is has to be confirmed by you)
also you're the youngest maid but still 20+ (just to put it out there)

this was a request again. I've been having a lot of fun with these! especially the medieval AUs though I have to admit its REALLY pushing my vocabulary.. so sorry if it's a bit wonky T-T

You have a wish? my request form here ♥

sidenote: thank you so so much for all the requests! reading through them has me so excited for the scenarios! It will take a bit of time to get through all of them ♥ i can say that you seem to like the medievalAU and i am HERE FOR IT :3
creator: Belladonna.xoxo
